name: ELinkSmart lock
author: Slawomir Jasek
description: ElinkSmart-compatible (YL-P10BF, YL-P8BF, YL-P5BF)  BLE smart lock simulator: AES-128-ECB hardcoded key, chunked ATT framing, auth + challenge proofs.
notes: Note: the current application checks online the lock's MAC address and it will not work with the simulation - use old version 1.2.0 apk, or create own: https://app.hextree.io/courses/android-bluetooth-reversing/bluetooth-basics. See more: https://labs.reversec.com/posts/2024/02/multiple-vulnerabilities-in-elinksmart-padlocks https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1JDqhzQCtAA https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PmokIaUQvXs https://lehack.org/2023/track/vulnerability-analysis-of-a-bluetooth-low-energy-padlock/
